form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warragul (23.16) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length fifth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.12) when fourth over 390m at Shepparton in a Free For All. Is yet to miss the placings from this box, including two wins. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.60) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 8 lengths. Boasts six wins and two places from eight starts off the draw. Among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (25.91) over 450m at Warrnambool. Tricky draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (25.91) over 450m at Warrnambool. Tricky draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground from turn out of back straight.
Quick to begin; Raced wide to first turn.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 300m (17.04) beating Some Secret in Mix 6/7 on March 27. Happy enough to avoid.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 300m (17.04) beating Some Secret in Mix 6/7 on March 27. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th in a Grade 3/4 on March 25 over 366m at Capalaba behind Kill Your Smile beaten 12 lengths (20.76). Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Shepparton over 390m in 22.33. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 390m at Shepparton at Grade 5 FIN level. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fifth (17.06) at this track in a Free For All. Will jump from box 8 for the first time. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 5.5 lengths win at this track over 300m (16.94) beating Permit Fee in T3 Grade 6 on April 3. Prepared to risk this time.
